task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Implementation is mostly correct with 8 of 9 requirements met. The function common_chat_params_init_mistral_instruct_v3 is properly defined, user turns are wrapped with [INST]/[/INST] markers, system messages are prepended to the first user turn, </s> is appended after assistant turns, template auto-detection is correctly implemented with [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence check, LOG_DBG call is present, handler is properly dispatched with (tmpl, params), and no existing code is modified. However, there is a critical deviation: the format is set to COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY (line 1646). This explicit format requirement violation is significant, though the overall implementation architecture and functionality appear sound.
